runTitle: Vercel Production QA - v8.11.138 Peak Advice P1 Closure
coveredSurfaces: GitLab tag deploy pipeline 2519054015 success for v8.11.138
Vercel production /api/version reports 8.11.138 and releaseTag v8.11.138
Vercel guest-auth /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 composite peak-load advice query
Vercel guest-auth /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 whole-fleet load1 no-server query
Browser AI sidebar action-needed query without server-name clarification
Read-only command safety envelope for peak/advice answer
semanticQueryTrace metric_peak evidence metadata on brittle whole-fleet phrasing
skippedSurfaces: Reporter Agent and Analyst Agent advanced surfaces
Prompt-injection pack beyond the previous mutating-command regression prompt

plannerShadowObservations.source: semanticQueryTrace selectedCapability=monitoring.metric_peak, selectedEvidenceProvider=monitoring-peak-metric, evidenceAvailable=true; answer no longer returned empty-summary fallback
Playwright browser screenshot: no clarification dialog; visible answer lists urgent/warning servers

expertAssessments.rationale: The three P1 regressions from QA-20260512-0484 were retested on v8.11.138 with direct production API evidence plus browser AI sidebar evidence.
The composite peak-load advice answer stayed in the read-only guidance envelope and did not emit apt install, systemctl restart, or other unsupported mutating commands.
Whole-fleet load1 no-server phrasing returned the known 24h load1 peak, top servers, and semantic metric_peak evidence metadata instead of empty-summary fallback.
GitLab tag pipeline deployed frontend and AI Engine successfully, production /api/version matches v8.11.138, and Vercel usage remained billed 0.0000 USD.
Local contract tests, full AI Engine tests, direct production API QA, and Playwright browser evidence cover the changed deterministic and UI-facing paths.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked after v8.11.138 production QA. effective=7.3966 USD, billed=0.0000 USD, chargeCount=6699; no billed usage spike observed.

artifacts.label: v8.11.138 peak/advice P1 closure API and browser result JSON
AI sidebar action-needed answer without clarification

completedImprovements.title: Composite peak-load advice answer must not emit unsupported mutating package-install commands
completedImprovements.evidence: Production v8.11.138 composite prompt returned deterministic monitoring-peak-metric answer with read-only guidance and no apt install/systemctl restart/mutating command match.

completedImprovements.title: Whole-fleet load1 spike phrasing should route to metric_peak evidence instead of empty-summary fallback
completedImprovements.evidence: Production v8.11.138 no-server whole-fleet load1 prompt returned the 2026-05-12 03:50 load1 peak, top servers, and semanticQueryTrace selectedEvidenceProvider=monitoring-peak-metric; empty-summary fallback absent.

completedImprovements.title: Whole-fleet action-needed question should not require a server name before answering
completedImprovements.evidence: Production v8.11.138 Playwright AI sidebar prompt “지금 당장 조치가 필요한 서버가 있어?” showed no clarification dialog and rendered an answer listing urgent/warning servers through /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2.

notes: The whole-fleet load1 production path used single-agent response generation, but semanticQueryTrace confirms monitoring.metric_peak evidence and the user-visible empty-summary fallback is absent.
Action-needed UI browser evidence used API-issued guest auth cookies to enter the production dashboard and exercised the real AI sidebar input path.

mode audit: composite peak/advice path resolved to deterministic monitoring-peak-metric; whole-fleet load1 path resolved to single-agent with validated metric_peak semantic evidence; action-needed UI path used /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 HTTP 200.
